description_long: This is a compact, rectangular filing cabinet with a dark wood or laminate frame and two distinct front-facing drawers. The drawers are equipped with small, round knob handles, and the upper drawer appears to have a lock mechanism. The sides and top are finished in a matching dark material, while the front panels of the drawers are slightly lighter, providing a subtle contrast. The cabinet sits flush to the ground with no visible legs or wheels, giving it a sturdy and stable appearance. Its design is modern and functional, suitable for storing documents or office supplies in a professional or urban environment.
description: A modern, dark-finished two-drawer filing cabinet with round knob handles and a lock on the upper drawer. The cabinet is compact, sturdy, and designed for organized storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing two drawers with round knob handles and a lock on the upper drawer.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain, dark panel with two visible fasteners near the top edge.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a solid, dark panel with no visible features or hardware.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with a plain, dark panel and no visible fasteners.
